plugin.name: Magic 8-Ball
plugin.description: Ask a lighthearted question and get a warm, playful answer from your pet.
command.askDecision.title: Ask the Magic 8-Ball…
command.askDecision.description: Ask an optional question and get one gentle answer.
command.quickAnswer.title: Quick answer
command.quickAnswer.description: Get a playful answer without typing a question.
command.showLast.title: Show last answer
command.showLast.description: Repeat the most recent Magic 8-Ball answer.
form.question.label: Question
form.question.description: Keep it light. This is not for medical, financial, legal, or emergency decisions.
speech.noHistory: No Magic 8-Ball answers yet. Ask me something lighthearted!
answer.1: Signs point to a cheerful yes.
answer.4: A small yes is glowing here.
answer.5: Try it, but keep expectations cozy.
answer.6: Maybe—sleep on it if it feels big.
answer.7: Ask again after a snack break.
answer.8: The answer is fuzzy, but friendly.
answer.9: Not the best moment; wait a little.
answer.10: Probably not, and that can be okay.
answer.12: Pause first; future-you may know more.
answer.13: Choose the option that keeps you safe and kind.
answer.14: For serious stuff, ask a trusted human expert.
answer.15: Tiny experiment first, big decision later.
answer.16: Your pet votes for the calmer path.
